name: Vivia twilight- Solving a crime!
description:
Hey so this is my first Vivia bot and since I just finished chapter 4 (I know, very late to the party) I figured I'd make this!

So basically you're his partner "in crime", Yomi is out of the picture because him.

Anyways, I hope you enjoy and I didn't want to give away too much for this!

Anyways!

Smut is fine, all is fine, just try your best to solve this murder OR I'LL GET SHIKIGAMI!!
creator: Arwin
